feat.name: Keen Nose
feat.text: Accustomed to the foul air of underground tunnels, your sense of smell is sharpened, and noxious scents are less offensive. You gain scent as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Fortitude saves against olfactory effects that cause the sickened condition.

traits.name: Minotaur
traits.text: Minotaurs are horned, bovine humanoids with a mastery of mazes and puzzles.
